title: Cobblebros
description: Cobblemon, mega showdown, Legendary monuments, backpacks, waystones, and more!
body:
## ⭐ CobbleBros – Enhanced Cobblemon Modpack

**CobbleBros is a modpack designed for playing Cobblemon with friends, offering a more comfortable, complete, and optimized experience. It includes the core Cobblemon features, advanced battle systems, UI improvements, helpful tools for new players, exploration utilities, and visual enhancements.**

**🔥 Key Features**

- 🟦 Cobblemon – the main mod that adds Pokémon into Minecraft.
  
- 🎨 FancyMenu interface – using the same custom UI style from the official Cobblemon modpack.
  
- 💥 Mega Showdown – adds Mega Evolution, Dynamax, Terastallization, and more.
  
- 📘 Move Inspector – shows detailed move descriptions for newer players.
  
- 📚 Simple TMs – easily teach moves to your Pokémon.
  
- 🗿 Legendary Monuments – adds structures to help find legendary Pokémon.
  
- 🛠️ EMI – recipe viewer for all crafting recipes.
  
- ⚙️ Performance optimization mods – smoother gameplay and less lag.
  
- 📍 Waystones – fast travel across the world.
  
- 🗺️ Minimap & World Map – better navigation tools.
  
- ⚰️ Graves – recover your items after dying.
  
- 🎒 Backpacks – extra inventory space.
  
- 🧪 BetterF3 – improved debug screen.
  
- 🔥 Clear Lava/Water – better visibility underwater and in lava.
  
- 🎭 Improved texture packs – enhanced animations and visuals.
  
- ✨ Optional shaders – includes Complementary Reimagined.
  
## ⚠️ Optional Mod Removal (Better Performance)

**You can remove some mods if your PC struggles with performance.
For example: shaders, some visual mods, minimap/worldmap, or other non-essential features.**
## 📘 FAQ – CobbleBros

❓ 1. What Minecraft version does CobbleBros use?

➡️ Minecraft 1.21.1.

❓ 2. Does the modpack use Fabric, Forge, or Quilt?

➡️ Fabric.

❓ 3. Can CobbleBros be played on servers/multiplayer?

➡️ Yes, as long as the server uses the same mods.

❓ 4. Do I need a powerful PC to run this modpack?

➡️ No. A PC that isn't a potato will run it fine.

❓ 5. Does the modpack include shaders by default?

➡️ Yes, it includes Complementary Reimagined.

❓ 6. Can I add more mods on top of this modpack?

➡️ Yes, you can.

❓ 7. Does CobbleBros include all official Cobblemon features?

➡️ Yes.

❓ 8. Is FancyMenu already configured?

➡️ Yes, everything is preconfigured.

❓ 9. Any known issues or incompatibilities?

➡️ No issues as long as you use the included mods.

❓ 10. How can players report bugs or request features?

➡️ By leaving comments.

❓ 11. Do I need to install extra resource packs?

➡️ No, everything is already included.

❓ 12. Does the modpack support Mega Evolution / Dynamax / Terastallization from the start?

➡️ They are supported, but you don’t start with them.

❓ 13. Is Clear Lava/Water allowed on most servers?

➡️ Usually yes, but that depends on the mod creator.

❓ 14. Does the modpack change world generation?

➡️ Yes, because of the added structures.

❓ 15. Can I use this modpack on my public server?

➡️ Yes, as long as you ask for permission.
